title: Primary research and secondary research
summary: 9609 AS — first-hand vs existing data for marketing decisions.
learningObjectives: Compare advantages and disadvantages of each.

simpleExplanation.title: Collect new data or use what's there
simpleExplanation.summary: Primary research gathers original data from customers. Secondary research uses published sources such as reports and government statistics.
steps: Secondary is cheap but may be outdated.

sections.content: **Primary vs secondary** (3.2.2) follows **3.2.1 purposes**. Justify **choice** using case constraints.
